info.name: Unopim DAM API
info.description:
The UnoPim DAM (Digital Asset Management) API provides a comprehensive RESTful interface for managing digital assets, directories, properties, tags, comments, and linked resources. This API enables developers to integrate UnoPim's DAM capabilities into their applications.

**Official Documentation**: [Postman Documenter](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/21990056/2sA3kXE17F)

---

## 🔐 Authentication

All API endpoints require **Bearer Token** authentication.

**Headers Required**:

```
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

 ```

---

## 🌐 Base URL

```
{{url}}/api/v1/rest

 ```

---

## 📂 API Resources

The API contains **23 endpoints** organized into **6 resource groups**:

### 1\. Assets (7 endpoints)

- **GET** `/assets` - Get all assets (paginated)
    
- **GET** `/assets/{id}` - Get asset by ID
    
- **POST** `/assets` - Upload new asset
    
- **POST** `/assets/reupload` - Re-upload existing asset
    
- **PUT** `/assets/{id}` - Update asset metadata
    
- **DELETE** `/assets/{id}` - Delete asset
    
- **GET** `/assets/download/{id}` - Download asset file
    

### 2\. Directories (5 endpoints)

- **GET** `/directories` - Get all directories
    
- **GET** `/directories/{id}` - Get directory by ID
    
- **POST** `/directories` - Create new directory
    
- **PUT** `/directories/{id}` - Update directory
    
- **DELETE** `/directories/{id}` - Delete directory
    

### 3\. Comments (3 endpoints)

- **GET** `/comments/{id}` - Get comment by ID
    
- **POST** `/comments` - Create comment on asset
    
- **DELETE** `/comments/{id}` - Delete comment
    

### 4\. Properties (4 endpoints)

- **GET** `/properties/{id}` - Get property by ID
    
- **POST** `/properties/{asset_id}` - Create property for asset
    
- **PATCH** `/properties/{id}` - Update property
    
- **DELETE** `/properties/{id}` - Delete property
    

### 5\. Tags (3 endpoints)

- **GET** `/tags/{id}` - Get tag by ID
    
- **POST** `/tags` - Create and associate tag with asset
    
- **DELETE** `/tags` - Remove tag
    

### 6\. Linked Resources (1 endpoint)

- **GET** `/linked-resource/{id}` - Get linked resources

item.name: DAM
Asset

request.description: Return the embedded metadata (EXIF/IPTC/etc.) extracted at upload for the asset. For images with none stored, falls back to an on-demand read. Directory-ACL scoped.

item.description:

item.name: Tag

request.description: List every tag in the vocabulary. Optional ?query= to search by name, ?per_page= (1-100) to page.

Assign one or more tags to many assets at once. Tags are created on demand. Non-existent or inaccessible asset ids are skipped (not rejected); the response "count" reflects how many were tagged. Max 500 asset_ids.
Delete a tag from the vocabulary entirely — it is detached from every asset (pivot cascades). Gated by the api.dam.tags.destroy permission.

item.description:

item.name: Linked Resources
item.description:
In this section, we will see all the APIs which are related to DAM Linked Resources

###

request.description: List every share link you can see. Directory-ACL scoped: you only see shares whose target lives in a directory granted to your role. Supports datagrid-style filters/sort/pagination.
Create a share link for an asset. Pass asset_id. expiry_days (1-365, default 7) OR no_expiry:true for a permanent link. name is optional.
Create a share link for a directory (shares all assets inside it). Pass directory_id. Use no_expiry:true for a permanent link.
Update a share's name and/or expiry. Only the fields you send change: pass name to rename, expiry_days to reset the window, or no_expiry:true to make it permanent.
Revoke a share link (soft). The token/URL stops working but the record is kept so it can be reauthorized.
Reactivate a previously revoked link — the original token/URL works again (no new link is minted).
